content:
# Session 20 (iter-020) ŌĆö Review Summary

## Metadata
- **Stage:** prover. One opus lane on `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/TensorObjSubstrate.lean`.
- **Sorry count (this file): 2 ŌåÆ 2.** The active seed-1 sorry was *eliminated and replaced* by a
  sharper one. Bare sorries: `exists_tensorObj_inverse` (L734, deferred terminal, untouched) +
  `pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_isOpenImmersion` (K1, L4172, NEW ŌĆö the sole open D4ŌĆ▓ brick).
- **Targets attempted:** seed-1 `pullbackTensorIsoOfLocallyTrivial` (D4ŌĆ▓ chart-chase); residual K1.
- File GREEN (only the two expected sorry warnings). 5 new declarations landed.

## Target: `pullbackTensorIsoOfLocallyTrivial` (D4ŌĆ▓, `lem:pullback_tensor_iso_loctriv`) ŌĆö PARTIAL
The scaffolded opaque sorry `haveI : IsIso (pullbackTensorMap f M N) := sorry` (old L4103) was
**replaced by a complete, sorry-free chart-chase body**. Five decls added (line numbers post-edit):
- `isIso_of_isIso_comp4_mid` (L4095, generic): middle factor of `a Ōē½ b Ōē½ c Ōē½ d` is iso when the
  composite + 3 flanking factors are. ŌÜĀ composite-hyp must come FIRST so `a,c,d` pin by unification
  before instance args resolve (else metavariables ŌåÆ TC fails); final form takes the iso proofs as
  explicit args (`h ha hc hd`), not instances.
- `pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_base_unit` (K2, L4108): `pullbackTensorMap f P Q` iso when `P,Q Ōēģ ­ØÆ¬_X`,
  via `pullbackTensorMap_natural` (D1ŌĆ▓) + `pullbackTensorMap_unit_isIso` (D2ŌĆ▓) + `tensorObjIsoOfIso`.
  Sorry-free, axiom-clean.
- `chart_isIso` (L4184): the per-chart obligation, two `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` (D3ŌĆ▓) splits of
  `j' Ōē½ f = g Ōē½ W.╬╣`, isolate middle factor by `isIso_of_isIso_comp4_mid`, close by K1 (twice) + K2.
- `pullbackTensorIsoOfLocallyTrivial` (L4238): cover `Y` by `{fŌü╗┬╣W y}` (common trivialising affine
  charts via `exists_isAffineOpen_mem_and_subset` + `restrictIsoUnitOfLE`), `isIso_of_isIso_restrict`,
  `chart_isIso` per point, `asIso`. **Body sorry-free; `.hom` defeq to `pullbackTensorMap`.**
- (K1 below.)

Tactic notes captured: nat-iso inverse components `(pullbackComp _ _).inv.app T` are NOT found by
plain `inferInstance` ŌåÆ use `inferInstanceAs (IsIso (((pullbackComp _ _).app T).inv))` (defeq cast);
`IsIso (a Ōē½ b Ōē½ c Ōē½ d)` is not an auto instance ŌåÆ chain `IsIso.comp_isIso'`.

**Key finding ŌĆö the blueprint UNDER-COUNTED.** The blueprint proof (and the overview's claim "the only
genuinely new sub-step is D3ŌĆ▓", ~L2303) asserts the per-chart obligation reduces *directly* to the unit
pair via `lem:pullback_tensor_iso_unit`. It does not: both D3ŌĆ▓ base-change factorisations leave a
`pullbackTensorMap` over an **open immersion** (the chart inclusions `j'`, `W.╬╣`) with arbitrary
modules, forcing a fifth ingredient K1 that the blueprint never names. Confirmed by tos020 (must-fix).

## Target: `pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_isOpenImmersion` (K1, L4139) ŌĆö BLOCKED (reversal signal hit)
Attempt: reduce via `isIso_pullbackTensorMap_of_isIso_sheafifyDelta` to `IsIso (a_Y.map ╬┤)`, then to
`IsIso ╬┤` at presheaf level, then invoke Mathlib `instance [F.Monoidal] : IsIso (╬┤ F X Y)` by exhibiting
`(pullback ŽåR).Monoidal` via `Functor.Monoidal.transport` of the strong-monoidal `pushforward ╬▓`
(╬▓ = open-immersion structure-ring iso; H1 = `leftAdjointUniq : pushforward ╬▓ Ōēģ pullback ŽåR`).
**Failed to elaborate on TWO Mathlib-absent instance diamonds:**
1. `MonoidalCategory (PresheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf.obj)` not globally synthesizable (keyed on the
   syntactic `X.presheaf ŌŗÖ forgetŌéé` carrier, only defeq) ŌĆö `transport` needs the functor-level
   `(pushforward ╬▓).Monoidal` instance which mentions that non-synthesizable carrier.
2. Goal `╬┤` uses `presheafPullbackOplaxMonoidal` (adjunction mate); `transport`'s
   `Monoidal.toOplaxMonoidal.╬┤` (via `coreMonoidalTransport`) is not defeq ŌåÆ no `transport_╬┤` bridge.

This is **exactly the iter-020 pre-authorized reversal signal** ("an instance class the generic-lemma
`exact` device does NOT cross ŌåÆ STOP + report; that class ŌåÆ mathlib-analogist next iter") and matches
the ARCHON_MEMORY top bullet (top-level monoidal-carried extraction FAILS ŌĆö keep reductions IN-PROOF).
The math is settled (open-immersion pullback is strong monoidal, used object-level in the CLOSED
`tensorObj_restrict_iso`); what is missing is a Mathlib-scale *functor-level* strong-monoidal pullback
model. Informal agent correctly NOT consulted (obstacle is a Lean instance-carrier diamond, not a
missing argument). Typed sorry retained; ingredient written to
`informal/pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_isOpenImmersion.md`.

## Reviewer audits
- **lean-auditor (aud020):** 0 must-fix / 2 major / 2 minor. Axiom-checked: `pullbackTensorIsoOf...`
  and K1 carry `sorryAx` (K1 direct, the iso transitive via `chart_isIso`); `isIso_of_isIso_comp4_mid`
  + K2 axiom-clean; all 5 helpers non-vacuous + used; body NOT laundered (proper `by`-block chart-chase,
  not bare sorry). 2 MAJOR = stale .lean comments (L46 header says `~L4001`/"prover closes next via
  chart-chase" ŌĆö decl at L4238, chart-chase already the body; L4014 "SORRY STRUCTURE CHOSEN: haveI :=
  sorry" ŌĆö body uses full `by`-block). 2 MINOR = L44 line drift, L158-159 layout omits 4 new helpers.
  Report: `task_results/lean-auditor-aud020.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint (tos020):** 1 must-fix / 1 major / 1 minor. MUST-FIX = blueprint under-counts D4ŌĆ▓:
  K1 missing from both `\uses{}` and any node; "only D3ŌĆ▓ is new" claim wrong. MAJOR = the pinned iso's
  proof not closed (transitive sorry via K1) ŌĆö genuine open math, not fake. MINOR = stale `% NOTE:`
  L3666-3669. Signature + `\lean{}` pin + statement `\leanok` all now well-formed.
  Report: `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-tos020.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:pullback_tensor_iso_loctriv`: **rewrote the stale `% NOTE:`**
  at L3666-3669 (it claimed the `\lean{}` pin target was absent / "iter-271 forward reference" ŌĆö the
  decl landed iter-020 at L4238 and the pin now resolves). New NOTE records that the proof is NOT yet
  closed (open via K1), that K1 is omitted from the prose/`\uses{}`, and the planner TODO to add a K1
  node. No `\leanok` override: statement `\leanok` (L3662, decl formalized w/ transitive sorry) and the
  proof block carrying NO `\leanok` (open sorry) are both deterministically correct.

## Recurring-pattern note
7th consecutive "this file: sorry 2ŌåÆ2" iter, but this one is a genuine PIVOT (D3ŌĆ▓ DONE iter-019;
this iter built the entire D4ŌĆ▓ chart-chase, eliminating the opaque seed-1 sorry and replacing it with
the crisp, well-scoped K1). Not helper-churn on the same wall: 4 of 5 new decls fully closed, residual
is a single named Mathlib-scale brick. K1 is the genuine frontier ŌĆö see recommendations.
